name: Lemon Fire Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the lemon juice, lemon peel, and egg and beat well.
4. Sift the dry ingredients together.
5. Beat the sifted dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
6. Place the mixture into a cookie press.
7. Force the dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8 minutes or until cookies are lightly browned.
Yield: 6 dozen
Heat Scale: Mild
